title: Subscription Cost Tracker
description: Track monthly and yearly subscription costs across streaming, apps, memberships, and digital tools.
audience: People reviewing recurring subscriptions and reducing monthly expenses
trendAngle: Households are auditing recurring streaming, app, AI, and creator-tool subscriptions as monthly costs rise.

inputs.label: App and software subscriptions per month
Memberships and creator subscriptions per month

faq.question: What subscriptions should I include?
faq.answer: Include streaming apps, cloud storage, AI tools, creator memberships, mobile apps, and any recurring digital payment.

faq.question: Does this connect to my bank account?
faq.answer: No. You enter the numbers manually, and the generated app stores values locally in your browser.

faq.question: How often should I review subscriptions?
faq.answer: A monthly or quarterly review is usually enough to catch unused recurring costs before they build up.

disclaimer: This tracker is for budgeting and planning only and is not financial advice.
